Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in successful variants (ending with Payment Handled)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to be followed by any rejection activity (e.g., Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION, Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in variants containing rejections by PRE_APPROVER later in the trace
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION compared to the average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in traces that do not involve any rejection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the next activity when the case originates from a resubmission after Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE occurs

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION after a prior rejection by ADMINISTRATION in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants where no budget owner approval is required
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'
